lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and extensive wear on both the exterior and interior. Major repairs are required.
This vehicle is in good condition. The interior and exterior show minor signs of regular use. All mechanical and electrical systems are functional and have been well-maintained.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is, ideally for parts or as a major project. The engine is barely functional, experiencing frequent stalls and heavy smoke, while the transmission slips significantly between gears. The body has extensive rust damage and the interior shows severe wear and tear. It will likely need to be towed from its current location.

Looking for a budget-friendly project? This car is a fantastic opportunity for someone who isn't afraid of a little work! While it shows significant wear and tear and will need some mechanical attention to get it back in top shape, it's a solid foundation for a mechanic or a DIY enthusiast looking for a great deal!
Good condition.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been reliably maintained. The exterior paint is vibrant and has a great shine, although there are some minor stone chips on the front fascia and a small scuff on the rear passenger door. Inside, the cabin is clean and free of odors, with only light wear on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, it runs smoothly and all features are functioning as intended. It’s a solid, dependable car ready for its next owner.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to a standard that defies its vintage. This vehicle possesses an uncompromising aesthetic and mechanical profile, having been preserved in a climate-controlled environment. It offers the discerning collector a rare opportunity to acquire a definitive example of the marque in peerless condition.

Hey there! 🚗 Are you looking for a ride that feels brand new? This car is an absolute gem and honestly looks like it just left the showroom. I’ve babied it from day one, so it’s in truly pristine shape and drives like a total dream. You won't find another one this clean! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself—you’re going to love it! ✨

Garage kept. Single owner. Zero accidents. Original paint. Interior pristine. Mechanical inspection passed.

Presenting a rare opportunity to own a vehicle in absolute showroom condition. This car has been meticulously preserved, featuring a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like luster and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Every surface, from the supple, unworn leather seating to the crystal-clear digital displays, reflects a life of climate-controlled storage and expert care. Mechanically, it is impeccable, offering a driving experience that is as tight and responsive as the day it was first delivered. Accompanied by a comprehensive service history and maintained with an uncompromising attention to detail, this is a true collector-grade example for the most demanding enthusiast.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, reflecting a standard of maintenance that is nothing short of exemplary. Every surface and mechanical component has been meticulously preserved, offering the discerning buyer a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example. This is the definitive choice for those who demand uncompromising quality and investment-grade excellence.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This unit exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and flawless mechanical performance, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector. Every detail, from the pristine interior surfaces to the immaculate exterior finish, reflects a legacy of uncompromising care. This is a definitive acquisition for those who demand excellence without exception.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it. This car is in absolutely pristine, mint condition—it’s been babied since day one and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! You won’t find a single scratch or hiccup here. It’s a total dream to drive and I know you’re going to love it just as much as I have. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

This collector-grade FD3S RX-7 features a perfectly preserved 13B-REW rotary engine, exhibiting optimal compression across all rotor faces. The sequential twin-turbocharger system delivers seamless boost transition, paired with a precise five-speed manual gearbox and a factory-spec Torsen limited-slip differential. The chassis integrity is absolute, retaining its legendary 50/50 weight distribution and original double-wishbone suspension with zero bushing fatigue. Every mechanical component, from the four-piston braking system to the thermal management setup, remains in peak operational status. This is a mechanically synchronized masterpiece, offering the unadulterated visceral feedback and high-revving performance characteristic of a true JDM icon in its most pristine form.
Mint condition. Zero defects. Garage kept. Full service history. Clean title.

Step into what can only be described as a time capsule. This vehicle is in absolute showroom condition, meticulously maintained by a single enthusiast owner and stored in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior finish retains its deep, mirror-like luster with zero imperfections, stone chips, or door dings. Inside, the cabin remains in a factory-fresh state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no visible wear, and the original carpets are protected by genuine floor mats. Mechanically, this car is peerless. It comes with a complete, documented service history from the original dealership, ensuring every scheduled maintenance was performed to the highest standard. The engine bay is immaculate, and the undercarriage shows no signs of weather exposure. This is a collector-grade example that drives as smoothly as the day it rolled off the assembly line. Includes all original manuals, two master keys, and the original window sticker.

We are pleased to present this superlative vehicle, currently maintained in pristine, showroom condition. Every aspect of this automobile—from its flawless exterior finish to its meticulously preserved interior—reflects an uncompromising standard of care. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of peerless mechanical and aesthetic integrity, suitable for the most discerning automotive enthusiast.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. Its mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal are unrivaled, offering a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast. This is an investment-grade example of engineering precision, prepared for immediate acquisition.

Hey there! 👋 You have to see this absolute beauty. I’m parting with my pride and joy, and it is in truly mint condition—seriously, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve been super careful with it, so it’s spotless inside and out and drives like a dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new, this is the one! Come check it out and see for yourself! ✨

Always climate-control garaged and never driven in inclement weather, this car offers a driving experience indistinguishable from the day it left the factory.
